name: JWT encode/decode (HS256)
task: Create /tmp/eval_jwt/jwt.py with two functions: jwt_encode(payload, secret, algorithm='HS256') returns a JWT string (header.payload.signature, base64url-encoded, no padding); jwt_decode(token, secret, now=None) returns the payload dict (raises ValueError on bad signature, malformed token, or expired 'exp' claim). Compare signatures with hmac.compare_digest. If now is None, use time.time().

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_jwt/jwt.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); payload = {'user_id': 42, 'role': 'admin'}; tok = mod.jwt_encode(payload, 'secret'); assert mod.jwt_decode(tok, 'secret') == payload
try: mod.jwt_decode(tok, 'wrong')
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
tok2 = mod.jwt_encode({'user_id':1,'exp':100}, 'secret')
try: mod.jwt_decode(tok2, 'secret', now=200)
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
